summary: Comprehensive testing of FABVERSE ERP application completed. Backend APIs show 92.9% success rate with fully functional production pipeline. Frontend UI demonstrates complete workflow from login through all production stages with proper challan generation.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Authorization header not properly passed from frontend

integration_issues.issue: 404 errors when accessing challan view pages
Reports and other pages redirect to login when accessed directly

passed_tests: Create lot with detailed cutting information
Lot detail page shows complete information

Fabric roll calculations and cost analysis
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix challan view routing issue causing 404 errors. The challan components exist but URL routing is not working properly. Also review authorization header passing for password change API.
